name: Mode Switcher
description: Self-escalating model routing — upgrades to a smarter model when it's needed, reverts automatically when it's done.

modes.description: Map of mode name to mode configuration. Each mode can override the model, provider, and turn limit.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in the tool definition

model.description: Bare model name (e.g. claude-opus-4-6). null = session default.

provider.description: Provider name (e.g. anthropic, openai). null = session default.

thinking.description: Reserved for future use. null = model default.

maxTurns.description: Number of turns before auto-reverting to baseline. null = no limit.
